entry.title: Pre-check "Complete assigned notifications" on "Find maintenance order" app
entry.content:
Hello,

while doing completion of orders using button available on above ribbon on "Find maintenance order" app, checkbox for completing assigned notifications is not pre-checked.

Since this is a Fiori Standard, my colleague fiori consultant is not aware of how these changes can be performed. How can they perform it?

Is there a way to have this checkbox checked by default in this new app?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: I want to ask about difference between Tables and or...
entry.content:
"Tables > 1 billion rows" refers to the actual tables in the SAP HANA database that have more than 1 billion rows of data. These are the tables that are currently in use and being updated in real-time.

 

On the other hand, "Table histories > 1 billion rows" refers to the historical versions of these tables that have more than 1 billion rows. In SAP HANA, when changes are made to a table, the system keeps a historical version of the table to allow for data recovery and auditing. This metric monitors the size of these historical tables.

Refer to Help Portal Link 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_HANA_ONE/1c837b3899834ddcbae140cc3e7c7bdd/d0b2c5142a19405fb912f71782cd0a84.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: How to link a Storage bin / Material with a Storage L...
entry.content:
Hello @BBQMaster68 

The org structure you have asked about implies storage location to storage location transfer postings. Those are done with the LQ01 transaction / the RLLQ0100 report. You can also have the transfers automated with the settings in the Logistics Execution -> Warehouse Management -> Interfaces -> Inventory Management -> Define Posting Changes node. 

LQ02 is for WM initiated transfer postings between stock types, not between storage locations. 

LU01, LU02 are used to maintain posting notifications. You don't need to use them for your scenario.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Assignment Profile Behaviour with Items, Library, Curricula
entry.content: Thanks @M_jess1 thats really helpful... it was the difference in Libraries vs Other content that I was looking for confirmation on from an expert - much appreciated

entry.title: Row Level Security in SAC
entry.content:
Can we share a story in a view mode with a BI content viewer user role without sharing the model files with this user?

Or is there any customization to the content viewer role to help achieve this?

Also, I don't want to make the user BI Admin, I only want to give them read privileges.

Thank you

entry.title: Query Qty not matching with Batch Inventory Transactions Report
entry.content:
Hi
In below query Qty is not matching with Batch Inventory Transactions Reports. Query does not show some Warehouses Data. Is there any other table to be linked or may be Opening Batch Quantities not coming.
 
SELECT T0."ItemCode", max(T4."ItemName") ,
T3."DistNumber",T3."InDate",T3."MnfDate", T3."ExpDate",
T2."WhsCode",
(Select Sum(A0."OnHandQty") from OBBQ A0 where A0."SnBMDAbs"  = Max(T3."AbsEntry") and A0."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode" and A0."WhsCode" = T2."WhsCode") as Qty
FROM OIBQ T0  LEFT JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0."BinAbs" = T1."AbsEntry" and T0."WhsCode" = T1."WhsCode" LEFT JOIN OBBQ T2 ON T1."AbsEntry" = T2."BinAbs" and T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" LEFT JOIN OBTN T3 ON T2."SnBMDAbs" = T3."AbsEntry" and T0."ItemCode" = T3."ItemCode" left join OITm T4 on T4."ItemCode" = t0."ItemCode"
group by T0."ItemCode", T0."OnHandQty", T3."DistNumber" ,T2."WhsCode",T3."ExpDate", T3."MnfDate", T3."InDate"
Having sum(T2."OnHandQty") <>0

entry.title: Isse related to Scope Item 34P - Treasury Workstation Cash Integration
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

We are transferring Cash Flow items from S4HC to S4HOP (table-FQM_FLOW), where the Company Code and Bank data should be maintained in the S4HOP, the same as in Cloud.

Based on the information from scope ID 34P, we understand that it will update the Cash Flow items.

 

However, it is not mentioned whether this will affect core accounting tables (e.g., BKPF, BSEG, etc.). Could you please confirm that this integration will not have any impact on the core accounting tables in S4HOP?

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Isse related to Scope Item 34P - Treasury Workstation...
entry.content: The process will replicate cash flow in FQM_TABLE from one S/4 system to another S/4, without any impact on BSEG/BKPF.

entry.title: Requirement is to extend the NET PRICE field length in Purchase order.
entry.content:
While creating Purchase Order, unable to enter the net price with 13 digits. Is it possible to increase field length to 13 instead of 11?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Requirement is to extend the NET PRICE field length i...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP standard, the field NETPR has been defined with length 11 (9 digits + 2 decimals), and this cannot be changed, as this would affect all programs and tables that use it. Every program would need to be adjusted to handle the new field length and existing data would need to be converted.

This is the standard behavior and can't be changed from SAP end.


Refer the SAP Note: 456691 - FAQ: Price determination in purchasing question 38: -

Question : Can I use net prices that have more than 11 digits (including decimal places)?

Answer : The field for the net price can be filled only with 11 characters (including 2 decimal places). A larger value usually leads to an overflow error ('price overflow error'). You can avoid this error by i) reducing the related quantity, ii) splitting the material item into several items, iii) changing the price unit of measure accordingly. The same applies for effective prices, which cannot exceed 13 digits (including 2 decimal places).


See also KBA 2437956 - EKPO-NETPR has 11 (9+2) digits in length - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA - EKPO-NETPR has 11 (9+2) digits in length - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA.


  • Possible workarounds include: 
    • split the value into multiple items or
    • define a new unit of measure for this product. This unit A of measure should be, for example 10 A = 1 unit, and then create the purchase documents with only 1 unit.
Hope this helps.
Thanks

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content:
Hi @Mathias_Uhlmann ,

but does it make any difference? It's still OData. The exact same OData API exists also as V2 and works with SAPUI5.

Cheers, Uwe

entry.title: Tax Code and Tax determination in the manual settlement document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using Vertex for tax determination. While creating the manual settlement document (0S32), the tax code and tax amount are not populating at the item level. The user needs to check the tax at the line item (in the condition tab) and then enter it manually. Otherwise, the system does not allow saving the document due to the gross and net amount mismatch. In the case of automatic settlement, the taxes are determined automatically.

Is there any way to determine the tax code and tax amount automatically or at the time of saving the document?

Please suggest. 

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content:
Hi @UweFetzer_se38,

I fear it does. UI5 cannot handle scale="floating" for Edm.Decimal so far. In API use cases this seems to be less of an issue. That is your concrete issue.

But there are other things. For example, as described in Currency and Unit Customizing in OData V4 an ABAP backend will provide the unit and currency customizing to the UI. If I am not mistaken than this happens only for UI services (for OData V4 and OData V2).
Also API services might not contain all the annotations needed for the UI. Although that might be less of an issue with a freestyle application.

This does not mean that an API service could not be used on the UI at all but there are hurdles. 

Best regards
Mathias.

entry.title: Re: Query Qty not matching with Batch Inventory Transactions Report
entry.content: Your query may miss some warehouse data or opening batch quantities. Ensure all warehouses are correctly referenced and check if any additional tables store opening batch quantities. Here's a revised query: sql SELECT T0."ItemCode", MAX(T4."ItemName"), T3."DistNumber", T3."InDate", T3."MnfDate", T3."ExpDate", T2."WhsCode", (SELECT SUM(A0."OnHandQty") FROM OBBQ A0 WHERE A0."SnBMDAbs" = MAX(T3."AbsEntry") AND A0."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode" AND A0."WhsCode" = T2."WhsCode") AS Qty FROM OIBQ T0 LEFT JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0."BinAbs" = T1."AbsEntry" AND T0."WhsCode" = T1."WhsCode" LEFT JOIN OBBQ T2 ON T1."AbsEntry" = T2."BinAbs" AND T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" LEFT JOIN OBTN T3 ON T2."SnBMDAbs" = T3."AbsEntry" AND T0."ItemCode" = T3."ItemCode" LEFT JOIN OITM T4 ON T4."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode" GROUP BY T0."ItemCode", T0."OnHandQty", T3."DistNumber", T2."WhsCode", T3."ExpDate", T3."MnfDate", T3."InDate" HAVING SUM(T2."OnHandQty") <> 0 This might help include all relevant data.

entry.title: SMA Solar setzt auf SAP Cloud Application Services für mehr Unabhängigkeit in der Energieversorgung
entry.content:
Während der IT-Onlinekonferenz, die vom 27.-30. Januar 2025 unter dem Motto “S/4HANA-Transformation und Innovation mit SAP RISE und GROW” stattfand, gab Heiko Kehm, Head of IT Order to Cash bei SMA Solar Technology AG (SMA) wertvolle Einblicke in die Digitalisierungsstrategie seines Unternehmens. In einem Gespräch mit mit Maike Rose vom IT-Onlinemagazin sowie Claudia Johne (Client Delivery Managerin) und Patricia Gantert (Business Development Managerin), beide von SAP, erläuterte Kehm den Konferenzteilnehmern, wie SMA die SAP Cloud Application Services nutzt, um ihre digitale Transformation zu beschneunigen und zu vereinfachen.

Vor dem eigentlichen Interview wurden die Konferenzteilnehmer gebeten, zwei Fragen zu beantworten. Hier die Ergebnisse:

 

Zur Vorbereitung auf das Webinar formulierten die drei Gesprächspartner jeweils eine These zu SAP Cloud Application Services. Diese Thesen griff Maike in ihrer einleitenden Moderation auf und stellte sie dem Publikum vor.

Heiko Kehm:

Die Unterstützung im Applikationsbetrieb durch SAP Cloud Application Services helfen Unternehmen dabei, ihre Mitarbeiter*innen zu entlasten und sich auf die Digitalisierung ihrer Geschäftsprozesse zu konzentrieren. Dadurch kann das volle Potential des Cloud Investments schneller und mit besseren Ergebnissen entfaltet werden.

Claudia Johne:

SAP Cloud Application Services sind so konzipiert, dass sie einen optimierten Mehrwert für Kunden bieten. Der Application Services Manager stellt sicher, dass die Services effizient, zuverlässig und an die Bedürfnisse der Kunden angepasst geliefert werden.  

Patricia Gantert:

Was haben SAP Cloud Application Services mit Sport zu tun? Im Fitnessstudio kümmert sich ein kompetentes Team darum, dass das Equipment einwandfrei funktioniert und sich die Trainierenden voll und ganz auf ihren Trainingsplan konzentrieren können. Vergleichbar dazu fokussieren SAP Cloud Application Services auf flexible und vereinfachte Service-Nutzung und sorgen damit für Entlastung der Mitarbeitenden im Unternehmen.

Hintergrund und Unternehmensprofil      

SMA Solar ist ein führender Anbieter von Photovoltaik-Systemtechnik und Energielösungen mit Hauptsitz in Niestetal bei Kassel. Das Unternehmen wurde 1981 gegründet, beschäftigt heute rund 4’000 Mitarbeiter weltweit und erzielte 2023 einen Umsatz von etwa 1,9 Milliarden Euro.

SMA bietet ein ganzheitliches Portfolio für alle Segmente zur Erzeugung, Speicherung und Lieferung von Solarstrom - von Lösungen für Privathaushalte bis hin zu Industrieanwendungen. Dazu gehören Photovoltaik-Wechselrichter, Speicherlösungen, Ladelösungen für E-Mobilität sowie Energiemanagement-Services und Apps.

 

 Vom digitalen Zielbild zur Digitalisierungsreise von SMA Solar

Als Grundlage für die Digitalisierungsstrategie von SMA wurde ein digitales Zukunftsbild entwickelt. Dieses betrachtet Prozesse, Daten, Anwendungen, Technologien sowie die Menschen – sowohl Mitarbeiter als auch Führungskräfte – in einem ganzheitlichen Kooperationsmodell. Ziel ist es, abteilungsübergreifende und inhaltliche Barrieren abzubauen und die digitale Transformation voranzutreiben.

Darüber hinaus wurden für das Unternehmen wichtige Leitplanken gesetzt, die dem Weg zum digitalen Zielbild einen Rahmen geben. Dazu gehört:

  • Die Standardisierung von Prozessen
  • Kompatibilität in Form von Plug-and-Play,
  • Geschwindigkeit zur Sicherung der Wettbewerbsfähigkeit, um flexibel auf Veränderungen zu reagieren und innovativ am Markt aufzutreten,
  • Eine prozessorientierte Arbeitsweise zur Verbesserung der Kundenzufriedenheit
  • Starke Partnerschaften, um sich auf die eigenen Kernkompetenzen konzentrieren zu können.

Das digitale Zielbild, Prozessphasen und wichtigste Erfolgsfaktoren von SMA im Überblick:

Seit 2015 verfolgt SMA eine konsequente Cloud-First-Strategie. Wichtige Meilensteine sind dabei:

  • Die Migration der SAP-Landschaft in die HANA Enterprise Cloud
  • Die Einführung von SaaS-Lösungen wie SAP SuccessFactors
  • Die Implementierung von SAP S/4HANA als digitaler Kern ab 2018
  • Die Umstellung auf RISE with SAP im Jahr 2022
  • Die Einführung von Digital Manufacturing in der Elektronikfertigung 2023

Heute ist SMA nahezu zu 100% in der Cloud und betreibt kein eigenes Rechenzentrum mehr.

Was sind SAP Cloud Application Services eigentlich genau?

Diese Frage wurde von der Expertin Claudia Johne erläutert. SAP Cloud Application Services bieten Kunden umfassende Unterstützung beim Betrieb ihrer Anwendungen und Prozesse. Als integraler Bestandteil des globalen SAP-Support-Netzwerks stellen sie eine Vielzahl von Dienstleistungen bereit. Über 1'500 zertifizierte Berater haben Zugriff auf aktuellstes Produktwissen. Bereits während der Einrichtung und Implementierung von SAP-Lösungen stellen sich häufig Fragen zum Betrieb der SAP-Landschaft und zur Gewährleistung der Stabilität der Systemlandschaft. SAP Cloud Application Services unterstützen aber auch bei Security- oder Cybersecurity-Themen, im Testmanagement, bei der Entwicklung oder Verbesserung des SAP-Stacks.

SAP Cloud Application Services unterstützen bei den folgenden Themen:

  • Gewährleistung von Stabilität, Zuverlässigkeit, Sicherheit von Anwendungen, Erweiterungen und Integration
  • Durchgängige Übernahme aller reaktiven und proaktiven operativen Aufgaben, damit der Kunde sich auf sein Kerngeschäft konzentrieren kann
  • Schnelleres Testen und Bereitstellen für eine schnellere Einführung von SAP-Lösungen
  • Einsatz und Betrieb neuer Funktionen und Technologien

Wie nutzt SMA Solar SAP Cloud Application Services?

SMA nutzt SAP Cloud Application Services (früher Application Management Services) seit über 10 Jahren. Laut Heiko Kehm sind die wesentlichen Gründe dafür:

  • Kostenflexibilität statt fester Kostenstrukturen
  • Entlastung des internen IT-Teams von Routineaufgaben
  • Hohe Qualität und Stabilität im Betrieb
  • Gesamtheitliche Verantwortung von SAP für Produkt, Betrieb und Beratung
  • Vertrauensvolle Partnerschaft zur Problemlösung
  • Fokussierung auf Kernkompetenzen und digitale Innovation

Claudia Johne bestätigte diese für SMA spezifisch genannten Vorteile und ergänzte sie durch folgende Eigenschaften von SAP Cloud Application Services:

  • Durchgängige Anwendungsverwaltung, d.h. Unterstützung bei der Verwaltung von SAP-übergreifenden Lösungen, von SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, aber auch Public Cloud-Lösungen wie SAP SuccessFactors oder SAP Business Technology Platform.
  • Enge Zusammenarbeit des SAP-internen Netzwerks.
  • Proaktives Solution-Management, z.B. zur Einhaltung von EU-Richtlinien.
  • Umfangreiches Sprachangebot auch ausserhalb der Standardsprachen Englisch und Deutsch.
  • Über den Application Services Manager als zentrale Ansprechperson wird ein durchgängiges Anwendungsmanagement sichergestellt, d.h. der Kunde bekommt alles aus einer Hand.
  • “SAP runs SAP”, d.h. SAP nutzt ebenfalls die gleichen Tools, Prozesse und Best Practices innerhalb der SAP.

Konkret nutzt SMA folgende Pakete der SAP Cloud Application Services:

  • Incident-, Problem- und Change Management
  • Application Operations für den SAP S/4HANA-Betrieb
  • Application Monitoring (Schnittstellen, Jobs, Zertifikate)
  • Security-Management (Implementierung von Security Notes)
  • Unterstützung bei Upgrades und Migrationen

Für welche Kunden empfiehlt sich der Einsatz von SAP Cloud Application Services?

Claudia Johne ging zur Beantwortung dieser Frage auf ein paar praktische Anwendungsfälle ein, in denen sie den Einsatz von SAP Cloud Application Services empfiehlt:

  • Kunden, die Betreuungsexpertise in bestimmten Anwendungen nicht Inhouse haben oder die Mitarbeitenden längerfristig in Projekten gebunden sind, können entlastet werden.
  • Oft haben Kunden geführte Implementierungen, d.h. sie haben für die Implementierungsphase SAP oder einen Partner engagiert und suchen ein Anschlussmodell für den Betrieb ihrer SAP-Landschaft.
  • Bei hybriden Lanschaften möchten sich Kunden evtl. auf ihre SAP S/4HANA-Landschaft konzentrieren. In dem Fall kann SAP Cloud Application Services zum Beispiel beim Betrieb der Public Cloud-Lösungen unterstützen.
  • Wenn es um die strategische Entwicklung der Systemlandschaft geht, also die Frage “Wohin soll es gehen? Was soll noch erreicht werden?” ist der Kunde in der Regel auf sich allein gestellt. Auch hierbei können die SAP Cloud Application Services zielbringend unterstützen und das Unternehmen entlasten.

Wie läuft die Zusammenarbeit rund um die SAP Cloud Application Services?

In der Praxis gestaltet sich die Zusammenarbeit gemäss Heiko Kehm durch definierte Rollen und regelmäßige Abstimmungen:

  • Wöchentliche Meetings zwischen SMA Service Manager und SAP Application Service Manager
  • Wöchentlicher Austausch zwischen SMA Inhouse Consulting und SAP Support Team
  • Enge Abstimmung mit SAP Account Management zu vertraglichen und strategischen Themen

Technisch erfolgt die Ticketbearbeitung über eine Schnittstelle zwischen dem SMA Jira-System und dem SAP Solution Manager.

Aus SAP-Sicht ergänzte Claudia Johne die Zusammenarbeit und ihre Aufgabe im Speziellen wie folgt:

Der Application Service Manager ist der direkte Ansprechpartner hinsichtlich der Cloud Application Services. Das umfasst die Verantwortung für das Lieferperformancemanagement, zu dem auch Liefereskalationsthemen gehören oder Abstimmungen bezüglich der operativen und planersichen Tätigkeiten, beispielsweise wenn SMA sich für neue Cloud Application Services interessiert.

Hier das Kooperationsmodell in der Übersicht:

 

Was sind wesentliche Erfolgsfaktoren für eine digitale Transformation??

Zum Abschluss des Gesprächs bat Maike Rose die Teilnehmer, jeweils ein oder zwei Schlüsselfaktoren für den Erfolg einer digitalen Transformation zu nennen. Genannt wurden:

  • Die Konzentration auf Innovation und Marktgeschwindigkeit
  • Die zunehmende Bedeutung der IT als wesentlicher Bestandteil des Geschäftsmodells
  • Die Schaffung von Innovationsspielräumen durch einen stabilen Betrieb
  • Die frühzeitige Erwägung von Cloud Application Services zur Unterstützung
  • Die Wichtigkeit einer offenen und kooperativen Zusammenarbeit

 

Zum Schluss noch ein paar praktische Tipps aus erster Hand...

  • Analysieren Sie, welche Cloud Application Services für Ihr Unternehmen sinnvoll sind
  • Definieren Sie klare Rollen und Verantwortlichkeiten in der Zusammenarbeit
  • Etablieren Sie regelmäßige Abstimmungsrunden auf operativer und strategischer Ebene
  • Nutzen Sie die Flexibilität, Services bei Bedarf zu erweitern oder zu reduzieren
  • Begleiten Sie den Change-Prozess im Unternehmen aktiv, um Akzeptanz zu schaffen

Fazit

Der Einsatz von SAP Cloud Application Services ermöglicht es SMA Solar, sich auf die Weiterentwicklung des Kerngeschäfts und die digitale Transformation zu konzentrieren.

Durch die Entlastung von Routineaufgaben und den Zugriff auf SAP-Expertise kann das Unternehmen Innovationen schneller umsetzen und flexibel auf Marktveränderungen reagieren. Eine vertrauensvolle Partnerschaft und klare Governance-Strukturen sind dabei entscheidende Erfolgsfaktoren.

Das Webinar wurde durch Sandra Schulze in einem Graphical Recording zusammengefasst:

Zur Aufzeichnung

Zu den Slides

 

Weiterführende Informationen:

SAP Cloud Application Services auf sap.com

Aufzeichnung und Folien zu vergangenen Webseminaren zum Thema Cloud Application Services: Home | SAP Cloud Acceleration Webcast | Cloud Acceleration Webcast

Adoption Infographic featuring SAP Preferred Success, SAP Cloud Application Services und SAP Learning Hub

Bei Fragen kontaktieren Sie uns gerne unter:

sap_cloud_acceleration_mee@sap.com

claudia.johne@sap.com

patricia.gantert@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content: Yes, You are right...

entry.title: Re: SAP Community The First Meetup of 2025 Istanbul 14th February
entry.content: We meet in a place where no one admits to being obsessive, but in reality, everyone is 🙂 so come and join us on the Valentine's Day 💗

entry.title: Re: SBOP BI Platform 4.3 SP04 Patch 10: Logon failed for...
entry.content: No update so far - I will open a support case and keep you updated.

entry.title: Duplicate field is appearing in the Custom Object without config change
entry.content:
Hi,

We have encountered a peculiar problem of Duplicate field appearance in the Custom MDF without making any changes to the Object Configuration or UI. The field started to appear post January 10th. No patch update has happened during that time for SF. Can any one please suggest any method to overcome this issue? or atleast on what basis this duplication occurs. This has come up in our overseas deputation object for only one of the components. Rest others are working fine.

Please any one can help on this or if u have faced any such situation kindly share.

entry.title: Re: BAPI Extension for Customer added Fields
entry.content: Its a nice knowledge sharing..Could you please share one things for custom fields are added in MIGO screen and now need to flow it : BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE in Extensionin and update the custom fields value in a ztable. Please share your opinion.

entry.title: Re: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

it is possible to create custom CDS Views (based on C1 released objects) and expose them via SQL Service for consumption in Datasphere Replication Flows.
See the documentation for more information.https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/ef2b2238154f4cd78a08df360447c1d5.html

Best Regards,


Nico

entry.title: Is it possible to read and filter the dimension hierarchy from live connection to SAC Planning model
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

On SAP Datasphere, there is a dimension hierarchy defined and I want to use the same hierarchy to filter out the members on my SAC planning model. For Example, Industry is a dimension and under it there are multiple leaf members like Automobile, Food, Retail, Pharma. I have not maintained the same hierarchy in SAC Planning model but rather have maintained only the leaf members.

The requirement is if the user selects the "Industry" hierarchy in the story, the table should filter only those members which are part of Industry hierarchy by reading it from SAP Datasphere analytical view. Is it possible to enable this functionality using scripting in SAC or is it mandatory to maintain the hierarchy in SAC Planning model for this requirement?

Anyone who has faced this issue recently or knows the workaround in this scenario. Their comments would be deeply appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Message 173-17 || Meldung 173-17
entry.content:
Hi there,
I did this in preparation of the transaction:

- one account A exclusively in one foreing currency,

- another account B exclusivly in another foreign currency, and

- one account for all currencies C

For the exact solution and how I made it work, see my respone to the comment above.

Kind regards,

  Manuel

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi @BramhaniG ,

But still i am not receiving message in the queue, could you please help.

 

Thanks, 

Deepk

entry.title: Re: Unsupported OData version 4.01
entry.content: Thank you @Mathias_Uhlmann, yes, I'm talking about Freestyle (via Neptune Software in my case). Do you haven an idea whom to contact on your side to make an official request to implement 4.01 support? (DM me, if you don't want to answer in public)

entry.title: Re: Tax Code and Tax determination in the manual settlement document
entry.content:
Could you addd a SAP managed tag such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition or SAP S/4HANA Cloud if relevant?

Are you asking for some hybrid behavior, automatic or manual settlement?

entry.title: Re: Restrict API access to Postman or any other sender
entry.content:
Hi @Eswark1 ,

Yo can publish the API with API Management service and apply policies. For example, you can use different APIkeys for each sender and with the policy "Access Control" you can selectively allow or block an IP or group of IP.

Regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Message 173-17 || Meldung 173-17
entry.content:
Hi Jitin,

the note didn't solve my problem, but helped me understand the system.

So after that reading I'd redefine my goal as follows:
"Get money from an account in one foreign currency, to an account in another foreign currency."

Instead of trying to get it all done in one journal entry, I did in with two separate Journal entry.

First Transaction: From Account A (foreign curency only) to account B (all currencies).

Second Transaction: From Account B (all currencies) to account C (another foreing currency).

It worked.

Kind regards,

   Manuel

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content: Were you able to check in the TCode "/N/IWXBE/EVENT_MONITOR" whether it is atleast getting triggered or not..

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content: Is it in undelivered status or acknowledged status in "/N/IWXBE/EVENT_MONITOR"

entry.title: Re: SAP Community The First Meetup of 2025 Istanbul 14th February
entry.content:
Sounds like my tribe 🙂 

Let's call it dedication not obsession for those who don't want to admit.

entry.title: To split the workflow based rule into two as the number of workflows in the rule has gone beyond 600
entry.content:
We have a scenario where the workflow based rule is created for Separation module for 32 countries having close to 700 plus workflows segregated based on action types. This is making the rule get overloaded. It takes time to load, to edit and/or make any changes. We still have close to 10 countries to on board for separation module and its making the rule more complicated. Is there a possibility to split the workflow based business rule into two? 

Kindly request you to suggest any solution to overcome this problem.

Or if you have implemented any solution for the same, requesting you to help with that.

entry.title: Central Deployment SAP B1 v9.3 PL14 error: Refresh the component lists on selected machines.
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I install sap b1 client and diapi from Central deployment it shows error: Refresh the component lists on selected machines., if anyone has solution, please support me. Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
Hi @n_gaertner 

Very interesting! Thanks for the response!

In "Using ABAP SQL Services for Accessing Data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud" (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/ef2b2238154f4cd78a08df360447c1d5.html),

It says "You can use the service to replicate data with replication flows or to federate data with remote tables."  Would this allow us to push down a select query from Datasphere onto the S/4HANA cloud HANA database?

What are the limitations that S/4HANA public cloud would have when using "Using ABAP SQL Services for Accessing Data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud" versus S/4HANA on premise when using "Using ABAP SQL Services for Accessing Data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud"?

Thanks!

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Defaulting Tax Category & Tax Rate (Configure Tax Menu) -

The Configure Tax Menu option/feature is a user specific feature useful for auto populating the predefined Tax Rate & Tax Category while creating Invoices.

For Example - Supplier Organization is invoicing customers from specific countries with fixed tax rate & tax category then this user specific feature is very useful and can save Invoice Processing time

To Configure the same one must follow below steps -

  1. Login SAP Business Network Supplier Account with Invoice Processing User.
  2. Open the PO and create Standard Invoice
  3. Under Tax section of Header or Line level you will see Tax categories dropdown (Buyers can configure Tax Categories which suppliers can choose while creating invoice, you can refer - How do I configure tax categories for my suppliers to choose from when invoicing?).
  4. In the dropdown, supplier user can click on 'Configure Tax Menu' option and for a fixed tax category & tax rate the supplier user can specify relevant values.

Once this is configured then the Tax Rate & Tax Category will be auto-populated when the same supplier user (that configured the 'Configure Tax Menu') creates the Invoice next time.

Please find below screenshot for reference –

entry.title: Re: how to handle unplanned freight cost
entry.content: I forgot to say also, but when creatin the invoice in Create supplier invoice APP, you have also a specific field for unplanned delivery cost...

entry.title: Re: SAP commerce cloud post order recalculation for refun...
entry.content:
Promotion apportioning is not implemented by default in SAP Commerce. If you need to determine the apportioned amount per order entry, you must implement custom logic. Where you place this method execution depends on what you aim to achieve with the implementation.

For example, if you want to display the apportioned amounts in the cart, you can implement CommerceCartCalculationMethodHook. In the beforeCalculate method, you can delete existing promotion-apportioned amount records and then recreate them in the afterCalculate method, ensuring that all promotions are evaluated and calculated.

If you need the apportioned amounts after the order is placed (e.g., to send the information to an ERP or invoicing system for refund amount calculations), you can use CommercePlaceOrderMethodHook. In the afterPlaceOrder method, you can calculate the apportioned amounts accordingly.

Additionally, in calculation of RefundEntry's amount value, the following method is used in DefaultOmsReturnFacade:

protected BigDecimal calculateRefundEntryAmount(final AbstractOrderEntryModel orderEntryModel, final Long expectedQuantity,
		final boolean completeReturn)
{
	final BigDecimal entryAmount;
	if (completeReturn)
	{
		entryAmount = BigDecimal.valueOf(orderEntryModel.getTotalPrice());
	}
	else if (CollectionUtils.isEmpty(orderEntryModel.getDiscountValues()))
	{
		entryAmount = BigDecimal.valueOf(orderEntryModel.getBasePrice() * expectedQuantity);
	}
	else
	{
		entryAmount = BigDecimal.ZERO;
	}
	return entryAmount;
}

So, you need to overwrite this calculation logic for entries with discount (promotion or regular discount). And in the case of order-level discounts refund amount would be calculated wrongly since this code does not take into account a discount applied on order-level.

entry.title: Down payment scenario
entry.content: I have a scenario where in Down payment done for 40% and need to calculate tax for remaining 60% value in customer Invoice, but the system calculating tax from the total order value. In DP inv tax calculated correctly MWST 15%  but in cust invoice for the remaining net value 15% tax calculation is happening on the total order value which is not correct. Experts seeking your ...advise.

entry.title: Analytical tool connection to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, can we connect to SAP S/4HANA Public cloud with some analytical tool like Power Query or Power Bi? If yes, how? 

Thank you 

regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hello @valeria_ortolan,

 to take the assessement the SAP Learning Hub subscription is needed.

The price depends on if you take the SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or the SAP Learning Hub, partner edition.

Both can be bought via the SAP Store here: SAP Learning Hub | Your Online E-Learning Enablement Platform

 

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi @BramhaniG ,

0 Outbound Events, what could be the issue.

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: Create/Restore Postgres DB Backup
entry.content:
Hello together,

i try to restore a backup from a PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option instance as described in the documentation with this command:

cf create-service postgresql-db standard backupdb -c '{"source_instance_id": <id>,“restore_time": <timestamp>}‘

But i get this error and do not find anything what is wrong:

Job (<job-guid>) failed: provision could not be completed: Service broker error: Service broker backing-services-broker-postgresql-db-cf-eu10-004 failed with: provisioning of instance <instance-guid> and plan <plan-guid> failed, cause: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'SnapshotCreateTime')

has anyone an idea about this SnapshotCreateTime? i can not find anything in the documentation :(.

Thanks and regards

heinrich

entry.title: Re: How to Call RAP Actions with Table Types from a List Report
entry.content:
@mainak-aich 

The username and password used for authentication are the ones you use to log in to Cloud Foundry. With these, you can place a debugger using your CB user.

entry.title: SAP Service Layer SQLQueries OSRT or ORST
entry.content:
Hi all,

For a project I need to access UDFs in ORST (Route Stage Master Data) with the Service Layer. Since there is no default endpoint for Route Stages which contains UDFs, I'm trying to use SQLQueries. From the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/f110a154dd0f4c20bf7f3ebca9eeb794/a11e6ae6ec8b4acfb227511fc4dbc9ce.html) I read that "Route stage master data (OSRT)" should be accessible with SQLQueries. But there is some thing confusing. However, the Route Stage Master Data is not in OSRT but in ORST. OSRT is indeed accessible, but this table s a "Korean Summary Report". When I try to access ORST, I get the message "Table 'ORST' not accessible".

Why does the documentation mention the wrong table for the Route Stage Master Data and why is the ORST table not accessible?

entry.title: SITVIE 2025 - Schedule is now online
entry.content:
We are excited to announce that the schedule for SAP Inside Track 2025 is now available!

Join us for a day of interesting talks and network with your local SAP community: get your ticket here

TimeSessionSpeaker
09:00OpeningSITVIE Orga Team
09:15Embedded Analytics - underestimated and ignoredSebastian Nigl
09:40Clean Core Extensibility: What is in it? How to measure? How clean can one be?Lukas Bretschneider
10:25Deploy and Manage SAP BTP with TerraformAkos Farkas
11:05Break-
11:20Say Hello! to ADT IDE Actions. A new and simple framework for extending the ABAP Development Tools with your own ideas.Thomas Alexander Ritter
12:05Clean SQLScript - write code that your colleagues don't hate you forJörg Brandeis
12:45Lunch-
13:45The importance of soft skills and psychological knowledge for SAP consultantsMarkus Waldl
14:30WYSIWYG and label print in SAPRegina Hochecker / Oliver Wahrstötter
14:55What's new in ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming ModelAndre Fischer
15:35Break-
16:05Event Driven IntegrationMartin Muttenthaler
16:50Unleash Beyond Boundaries: Building Generative AI Scenarios with the ABAP AI SDK.Ingo Bräuninger
17:30ClosingSITVIE Orga Team


Interested in sponsoring? We'd love to hear from you. 🙂
See https://sit.wien/become-a-sponsor for details.


See you soon,
SITVIE team

entry.title: Re: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
Hello Mel,

in general a limitation in the public cloud is that you can only use ABAP artifacts that are exposed via a stability contract.
That means that you can build your custom extraction enabled CDS Views only based on other Views that have been released by SAP - it is not possible to directly read from tables which are not exposed.
In Private Cloud you are able to build CDS Views more flexibly...

Pushdown of selection criteria should be possible (to some extent) using federation as well as in replication flows in Datasphere.

Best Regards,

Nico

entry.title: Re: How to activate CDS views that depend on each other?
entry.content: Has this issue been resolved yet? Mass activation did not work for me either. Error is: The data source "[artifact_name]" does not exist or is not active

entry.title: Re: SAP Build, Joule studio , Beta function not visible o...
entry.content:
Dear @Raju_,

Thank you for reaching out! Joule Studio is currently in beta, and access is limited to a selected group of participants based on use-case submissions. So it's completely normal that you’re unable to access it at the moment.

We’ve been running the beta program since Q4, and at this stage, we’re not accepting any additional participants. However, we’d love for you to stay tuned for the general availability (GA) announcement, where more users will get the chance to experience Joule Studio.

Thanks for your interest, and we appreciate your patience!

Best wishes,
Maria

entry.title: Re: Using BADI IDOC_DATA_INSERT for populating Z fields in VBAK table from IDOC document
entry.content:
Hi
thanks for the answer.
That is confirming that , using that BADI means then ALL idocs (whatever the message type) will call my implementation. That can be risky , so requires we are taking into account in the implem itself.

entry.title: [ChaRM] Need to change change cycle assignement in mass
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are using cCTS in ChaRM and I have a need to be able to change, in mass, the Change Cycle assignement of several Change Documents just before the move into production. I'm able to change the cycle in Charm with the option 'Change Cycle Assignement' but I have a requirement to be able to do it in mass. In standard, I don't found any report/function to do it. We are using the SAP Sol. Manager 7.2. I found this FM '/TMWFLOW/CRM_CHNG_DOC_REASSIGN' but it's now obsolet... Someone has an idea?

Kedalene Chong

Hello

Thanks for this useful blog, is really good.

But i have an issue, why adapt variants are not possible to add them in a TO? i have the app variants which i cannot transport it and i had my customizing request ready before to create them.

I think the object type ADVD (app variant) is only possible to move in a workbench maybe thats the reason?

thanks

entry.title: CAP Factory/Facade Pattern with Remote and Local Entities
entry.content:
Dear all

I was wondering if there is a good/certain way to implement some kind of factory or facade pattern with CDS to combine two entities from different remote services, into the current application.

Here is a brief example that I was thinking of. The goal would be to use as many tools from the CAP framework itself so I have to implement as few things as possible.

 ┌──────────────┐                                             
 │FactoryOrders ┼──────────────┐                              
 └──────────────┘          ┌───▼───┐                          
                           │Orders ├─────►use entity <Orders> 
 ┌──────────────┐          └───▲───┘      in OrdersService    
 │LogisticOrders┼──────────────┘                              
 └──────────────┘

Of Course FactoryOrders and LogisticOrders have the same keywords with the same types etc. But FactoryOrders is from one remote service and LogisticOrders are from another remote service.

At the moment, what I am doing is I have an entity Order, that is getting the keywords and types from one of the remote entities:

entity Orders {
orderNumber : FactoryOrders:orderNumber;
orderType : FactoryOrders:orderType;
orderData: FactoryOrders:orderDate;
}

Then in the on.READ event handler of entitity <Orders> I read the orders from both remote services and return the combined orders.

This solution does not feel completely right though and I am curious if there are better/different solutions.

I hope I explained the problem in an understandable manner, have a blast.

cheers

David

entry.title: Re: New Destinations UI available now in BETA version
entry.content:
While I'm happy to see a more usable UI and to no longer be faced with the page load / paging bug when viewing Destinations, this was a bit of a missed opportunity to streamline this more. Is there any reason not to have a drop-down option for existing Cloud Connector Location IDs and exposed resources at this point? Why do I still need to copy paste that ID and URL from the Cloud Connector tab?

Beyond that, the first time I tried to modify a destination I got n error:
"Failed updating the destination / Recieved response `400` with body: Property 'Name' has to be present only as path parameter"
Which apparently is an error that comes up whenever you try to edit the name of an existing destination in the Beta UI. Still works fine in the original. So that's not the greatest first impression. 🙂

Finally, I wouldn't expect to see this clearly marked "(BETA)" function available on our productive subaccounts which are clearly flagged to not enable beta features.

entry.title: Re: LE-WM using scan to count a Product during a TO confi...
entry.content: Thanks that is useful

entry.title: Re: SELECT all rows except those with computed values
entry.content: I'd suggest to add an ORDER BY to the LIST aggregate, such as ...list( column_name, ', ' , order by column_id)...

entry.title: Re: SAP RISE - Key Learnings
entry.content:
@savithakumar,

One minor clarification regarding:

What is RISE with SAP?

  • Cloud-based ERP system SAP S/4HANA in public or private cloud

RISE is Private Cloud (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition).  GROW is Public Cloud (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition).

entry.title: FlexibleColumnLayout: close detail page
entry.content:
On iPad: I am using the FlexibleColumnLayout to display an ObjectTable on the left page and a detail page on the right.
At the beginning only the List is displayed on the whole screen. By clicking on an entry the detail page for this entry will be opened on the right. 

How can I close the detail page so that only the list page is being displayed again?
The ClosePage Action is not working, when I try to execute it on the detail page.

The only way I found is to perform a navigation to my main page (where the flexibleColumnLayout is located).

clientAPI.executeAction({
        Name: "/Checklist/Actions/GenericNavigation.action",
        Properties: {
            PageToOpen: "/Checklist/Pages/Main.page",
            NavigationType: "Outer",
            ClearHistory: true,
            Transition: {
                Name: "Fade"
            }
        }
    })

But this has the disadvantage that the whole list page is rerendered and the list is scrolled to the top again.

Is there a better way to close the detail page of a FlexibleColumnLayout page on a tablet?

Tested with MDK 24.7 on iPad.

entry.content: Thank you @akashbansode-34 for this helpful addition 🙂

entry.title: Re: System Creating Reservation instead of PO
entry.content:
Hi Tanuj;

There is no configuration that makes the system create a PO instead of a purchase requisition. What you can do is automatically create the purchase order from the purchase requisition. In this case, seek assistance from the MM specialist.

Regards
Marcio Blos

Hi Nadeem,

 

You can apply for any exam and even i done the same. For Asset Management it is recommended to do PP, PPM, QM and PS certification for better opportunities

entry.title: Re: Customer Ship To Address ID
entry.content:
Hello,

This is a system limitation that cannot be overcome.

I suggest create a user field in CRD1 (BP Address) to enter the full information and use the default field to enter some alias for the address.

Hope it helps

entry.title: OSS Note 1623235 for S4CORE Release 108
entry.content:
Hello,
In the current system (ECC) we have implemented the OSS Note 1623235. We are involved in a migration to S/4 HANA system and found out that this OSS Note is not releveant for the new system with release 108.
I would like to ask you if the issue about this OSS Note is fixed in the new release or we need to implement other OSS Note?
BR

Joan Ignasi

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2024年01月 – 2024年03月）
entry.content:
本文主要收集了与集成扩展相关的常见问题(2024年01月 – 2024年03月)，按照主要问询对象API，CDS View，CPI，自定义字段和逻辑以及集成迁移相关对常见问题进行了大致的分类。客户可以点击下方链接查看到相关问题。

 

Contents

API相关问题... 1

CDS View相关问题... 2

自定义字段和逻辑相关问题... 2

集成相关问题... 3

其他问题... 3

 API相关问题

  • 问题：日记账分录的冲销按钮是否有API接口，客户在API Hub上没有找到。

解答：API Journal Entry - Post (Asynchronous)支持冲销操作。但是有一些限制：

只能冲销用API创建的日记账分录，在App里创建的日记账分录不能冲销。

已经创建后续文档的日记账分录不能被冲销。

已经清账或已经冲销的日记账分录不能被冲销。

预付款申请类型的不能被冲销。

模拟功能不支持。

 

  • 问题：如何使用API API_BATCH_SRV在storage location层面创建一个新的batch批次？

解答：在SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition里，batch level只能设为material层面，目前没有办法更新到storage location层面。如果有这个需求，可以提交CIP请求。

 

  • 问题：API接口无法读取数据，所有接口报401错误。

解答：这是由于客户使用的通信用户communication user太多失败的尝试too many failed attempts，导致用户被锁，所以所有的API调用读取数据失败。

 

  • 问题：使用新的Odata V4的purchase order的API，日期筛选条件跟之前V2的接口不一样，如何过滤LastChangeDateTime字段“2024-03-01”至“2024-03-15”的数据？

解答：可以按照以下的方式：

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder?$filter=LastChangeDateTime ge 2024-03-01T00:00:00Z and LastChangeDateTime le 2023-03-16T00:00:00Z

 

  • 问题：是否有API可以实现由采购申请生成采购订单的相关操作？

解答：目前没有API可以实现把采购申请转换成采购订单，作为workaround，可以使用Schedule Purchasing Jobs - Advanced, 选择模板 "Automatic Creation of Purchase Orders from Requisitions"

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/669f0858cea31f60e10000000a44147b.html

 

  • 问题：使用接口 /sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetcreatemain 或 /sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange 创建或修改固定资产成功或失败都没有信息返回。

解答：因为是异步API，所以是正常行为。如果需要查看信息，可以去Message Dashboard查看。

 

 

CDS View相关问题

  • 问题：客户想要知道actual cost component和standard cost component的CDS视图，因为要开发报表用。

解答：目前没有一个标准的CDS视图，因为不同cost component的值不是直接存在DB，而是runtime计算的。下面这个链接是cost component view相关的CDS，供参考：

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/2a753666fbe5414aaf7bc80444581275.html?version=2308.503

 

 

  • 问题：CDS的primary source被deprecated了，但有多个其他CDS依赖于这个CDS。不能只替换primary data source而不产生影响，应该如何做？

解答：建议copy一份custom cds view，然后替换被deprecated data source。然后把原custom cds view替换为copied cds view。

 

  • 问题：自定义CDS在测试环境显示正常有金额，但在正式系统中不显示金额，全部为0。

解答：在自定义CDS中有如下一段：

cast(cast(YY1_VMI1_1_1.buhanshuidanjia as ABAP.INT1) * * YY1_VMI1_1_1.shuilvshuzhi as ABAP.INT1 ) as ABAP.DEC(20,2) )

在测试环境中：

=> YY1_VMI1_1_1.buhanshuidanjia  > 1 .

=> Therefore:  YY1_VMI1_1_1.buhanshuidanjia as ABAP.INT1 > 1

在正式系统中：

=> Therefore:  YY1_VMI1_1_1.buhanshuidanjia asABAP.INT1 = 0

=> Therefore: hanshuidanjia = 0

 

  • 问题：想要删除自定义CDS里的两个字段，可是删除按钮不可用。如何做才能删除？

解答：如果需要删除字段，需要把所有的相关性都移除。如何查找相关性：

  1. 进入Extensibility Inventory，搜索自定义CDS视图
  2. 在dependency tree里，查找哪些对象还有依赖性

也可以查看下面两个链接：

https://me.sap.com/notes/2997519

https://me.sap.com/notes/3095949

 

 

自定义字段和逻辑相关问题

  • 问题：客户不能删除某个BADI的draft，因为创建这个draft的用户已经离开公司了。但是，也已经不能以这个用户登录了。

解答：参考Note 3301760。如果之前的用户已经离开公司，那么开事件到组件BC-SRV-APS-EXT-BL，并提供希望把当前draft分配给哪个用户，SAP会帮忙解决。

 

 

集成相关问题

  • 问题：API地址：https://myxxxxxx-api.s4hana.ondemand.com/ 不能访问了，导致外部系统API调用都有问题。

解答：这是一个operation的问题，碰到类似问题可以提事件到XX-S4C-OPR-INC。同时，可以通过调用地址https://myxxxxxx.s4hana.ondemand.com/来调用API。

 

 

其他问题

  • 问题：过账购置（集成应付账款），做日常做待摊和办公固定资产资本化，升级后的系统中，找不到此APP。

解答：Post Acquisition (Integrated AP) - Without Purchase Order app (F-90) 在CE2308被标记为deprecated，在CE2402会被删除.

Create Supplier Invoice - Advanced (MIRO) 是作为代替。

 

  • 问题：导入数据没有出错，但是中文文本跟导入文件里不符。

解答：当拷贝数据进XML文件时，不要选择copying data with formatting，应该只复制值。

 

 

 

 

以上为本次分享的全部内容。若想要了解往期更多有关集成扩展的常问问题，可以点击下方链接进行查看：

 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年01月 – 2022年03月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年04月 – 2022年06月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年07月 – 2022年09月）：click here.
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud集成与扩展FAQ（2022年10月 – 2022年12月)：click here.

entry.title: Re: RSRT with GUI 770
entry.content:
Hi, please follow these steps

SAP Logon 770 or higher -> Options -> Interaction Design -> Control Settings - HTML Control: Browser

Control = Internet Explorer

entry.title: Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures
entry.content:
Hi there, I have the following case with Material Substitution determination and BOM ERLA structures.

My client uses Material Determination Determ.Type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. This substitution works as there is a new material that comes into use with a new number, this new material can be substituted with the old material and vice versa depending on availability. The system looks if there is stock of the old one even if you have entered the new one, and if there is stock from the old number the system substitutes it in the sales order by adding a new line item with the old material number. Therefore there is one line item with the entered new material and one line item pops up with the new old material if stock still exists. This is fine form the materials with Item Category Group NORM. However, they also have BOM materials with ERLA Structure where the header material with   Item Category Group ERLA is the stock material and it has some service items as components. When there ERLA BOM Materials are entered the material substitution does not work as described above, even though they are defined i the same way in for Material Determination type A001 Material Entered in transaction VB13 with Substitution reason 0006 ProdSel - Order only. The clients expectation is that the BOM Header Material will be substituted with the old BOM Header Material based on availability. I am curious if this is just a standard limitation of using the BOM structures. Can anyone help?

S4 Hana on Premise

entry.title: Re: An RPA-Driven Solution for Managing Obsolete Contacts in C4C & ECC via CPI
entry.content:
Hi @Saurabh_Kabra ,

As mentioned, we are not directly sending the data to ECC system via RPA.
After prefix addition, the RPA will send it to C4C system via POST call in EOD for all the contacts received. Then C4C will make a call to ECC for update.


Regarding the addition of logic in CPI, since RPA is storing the data for entire day and then processing in the end of the day. Business don't want any logic & data store to be implemented in CPI.

Hope this answers your question.

Thanks, Siddhant H

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Sales
entry.content:
i have one issue can anybody help me for this please suggest the genuine reason? #SAP SD

combine of material and color coding-user may choose manually same material with color in pop up screen. and quantity ratio- suppose customer buy 10 main material we can give offer if customer buy 2 more then only discount will applicable.

#SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP DM Monitor Production Processes
entry.content:
Hi,

For failing Monitoring: Can you please check if the Destination setup is properly done ? For more information please check:

https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/application-help-for-production-connectivity-model-31068e16898c456997488c391e625c37/monitoring

Kind Regards,

Marcel

entry.title: GRDC cloud apps integration without Destinations
entry.content: Could GRDC apps be integrated with an S/4 private cloud in any way without using the Destination/connectivity service, but directly via API? Could the API Management hub on BTP be used to expose the required APIs from the S/4 backend to GRDC apps?

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier 

How can we test this?

Thanks,

Bramhani G

entry.title: Re: PO with Alternate UOM and Stock Report with Alternate...
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA, the path mentioned for enabling "Display Quantities in Alternative UOM" in MMBE has changed. Follow these steps instead:
1. Enable Alternative UOM Display in MMBE
- Go to Transaction MMBE
- Click on "Settings" (top-right corner)
- Enable "Display Quantities in Alternative UOM"
2. Configure in SPRO (If needed)
If the option is missing, check the following settings:
- SPRO → Logistics - General → Material Master → Settings for Key Fields → Define Unit of Measure Groups
- SPRO → Logistics - General → Material Master → Basic Settings → Define Attributes of Material Document Types (For stock display settings)
3. Use Fiori App for Stock Overview
Alternatively, use the Fiori App "Stock - Single Material" to display stock in both Base UOM (KG) and Alternative UOM (M2).

entry.title: Re: usercurriculumstatuses API in Successfactors learning.
entry.content: The operators you provided does not allow multiple combination of parameters as OR is not supported by LMS odata framework

entry.title: Re: Attribute of item in a curricula changes post item is...
Re: Submit ME2N and return cannot get the fields from asscount assignment button
entry.content:
Hi Siongchao_ng ,

Were you able to solve the above issue?

I'm having almost the same requirement and I've no clue how to solve it...

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steamp...
entry.content:
A HTTP 404 error (not found) means your call apparently points to a location that cannot be found. Any HTTP errors in the 5xx range would indicate the service is found, but there is an error within the service call, on the server.

First make sure the service you are calling has been configured on the SAP Public environment. Communication scenario, communication arrangement, the system, user etc. As long as those aren't in place, the service will simply not be there.

entry.title: Publish the terminated employees in worksheet to EC
entry.content:
Hi

I have a scenario where i need to pay the terminated employees (for previous year worked) and i am able to show them in my worksheet. Now for Publish to EC,  When i try to search for the terminated employees in the "Publish Selected Employees in Employee Central" search box, they dont show up in the search..Anyone faced this or any suggestions please let me know.

Regards

Vivek

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @leon3 , hi @Kushal_Banerjee , 

This information is in the FAQs:

SAP HANA database - via external tools, e.g. SAP HANA Studio, DBeaver, WebIDE

If you want to connect to HANA via external tools like HANA Studio oder DBeaver, you have to publish the ports 30213 and 30215 in the docker run command.

Same with WebIDE:

-p 8080:8080 or -p 53075:53075
Source: https://blogs.sap.com/2021/02/15/sap-abap-platform-1909-developer-edition-available-soon/comment-page-1/#comment-558716
 
HTH,
Julie.

entry.title: Re: Step by Step process to publish standard Business events from S/4 Hana to Event Mesh
entry.content: Not sure Deepak 😞 Raise it to SAP and request you to update the solution here.

entry.title: SAP Hana Express licence with more than 32GB
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

can it be that there are no more SAP Hana Express licences if the memory is more than 32GB? Some time ago you could buy them in the SAP Store. What is the future of SAP Hana Express?

Because the free tier environment for individuels is being discontinued, I thought I would revive the local Hana. But that gives me a bad feeling.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DYNAMIC_FORMS/631e73ccacc74215a6eed427953b2424/fdd67251f5b94ccc84b5fbb49bfd372c.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2411

entry.title: Re: SAP Estende Suporte para Versões Antigas Até 2033
entry.content: Excelente o seu compartilhamento aqui!

entry.title: Re: Re-create or Delete my Account
entry.content:
Hi @Ngarasa,

I tried to reproduce the behavior you are describing. If I am not mistaken, this is what you did and ended up with:

  1. You had a Trial account of your own
  2. Also, other users (e.g. colleagues) added you to their respective Trial account(s)
  3. You deleted your own Trial account, because you wanted to start over
  4. Now the issue is that when you go to the "Trial Home" at https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/#/home/trial, the "Go to Your Trial Account" button takes you directly to one of the other users' Trial accounts which you happen to have access to. Now you're "stuck" - there is no way for you to create a new Trial account for yourself.

If that is what's happened here, I'd say that is a bug. I will open a ticket internally for the responsible team(s) to look into it.

Meanwhile, a workaround I can think of is this: if you would ask the users who own the other accounts that you have access to whether they can (temporarily) remove your user from their accounts, you should be able to go to Trial Home at https://cockpit.hanatrial.ondemand.com/trial/#/home/trial and create an account of your own. After that, they can add you back to their accounts if needed.

entry.title: Period 13 for GL posting adjustment
entry.content:
Question on period 13 , for year 2023 . Please help and educate me on period 13 functionality. I understand that posting to period 13 is possible which we can see it in FS10N under period 13.

But please help on below queries: 

  1. Is it a continuation from period 12 of the ledger with all the balances carried forward?
  2. Can we post reversals/adjustment in period 13 without impacting the 2023 closing position?
  3. Can we run revaluation if needed?
